Privacy Policy

Welcome to Mr. Boss Realty! Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.

Information We Collect

  • Name and email when you contact us or authenticate via Facebook Messenger.
  • Messages sent to our Messenger chatbot.

How We Use Your Information

  • To respond to inquiries and provide services.
  • To improve our app and user experience.

Sharing Your Information

We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.

Security

We take reasonable steps to protect your data, but no system is completely secure.

Contact Us

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at info@mrbossrealty.com.

Last updated: October 31, 2025
